query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Nighttime street scene with streaking vehicle light trails in white, green, and red-orange, horizontal motion across the frame, dark sky, indistinct tree silhouettes, and curved road edge in the foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavily motion-blurred nighttime street scene with smeared light trails from vehicles creating horizontal streaks of white, green, and red-orange across the frame, indistinct tree silhouettes dissolving into darkness, a curved road edge in the foreground, oppressive low contrast throughout, and an abstract quality where representational elements dissolve into pure color and motion.
